channel.title: QE ArXiv Watch Weekly
channel.description: Weekly AI-synthesized digest of quality engineering research from arXiv. Covering Control Charts, Experimental Design, and Reliability Engineering.

item.title: QE ArXiv Watch: Week of April 27 - May 04, 2026
item.description:
This Week in Quality Engineering

This was a quiet week on arXiv for quality engineering research, with no new submissions in our monitored tracks. This occasionally happens, particularly around academic holidays or conference deadlines.

Looking Ahead: We encourage you to explore our archives in the QE ArXiv Watch dashboard where you can browse over 1,000 papers across Control Charts, Experimental Design, and Reliability Engineering.

Explore More: Visit the QE ArXiv Watch Dashboard to browse all papers with AI summaries, interactive filtering, and paper chat.

This digest is automatically generated every Monday. Questions or feedback? Open an issue on our GitHub repository.
